chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Federal Excise Reference Applications 48, 49, 50, 51, 52, 53 & 54 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.651/2021 3. For hearing of main case 18.09.2025 These reference applications are pending since 2021 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. The department, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Legal, LTO, Karachi, remains unrepresented without intimation or justification, therefore, in view of judgment of Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
